macro_regime.reasoning: Part 0A: Price above 20D VWMA with rising OI and moderate+ funding confirms BULL regime. NY session allows full leverage table.

analysis.bull_case: S1 HEALTHY_UPTREND: Both Spot and Futures CVD rising (BOTH_RISING state) confirms genuine accumulation — real money AND leveraged money buying simultaneously. OI rising alongside price means new positions are entering, not just short covering. Funding at moderate+ confirms longs paying a fair premium without the extreme levels that signal imminent flush. MACD histogram expanding above zero with RSI at 64 gives momentum confirmation. 11/12 confluence indicators aligned — Part 8 risk table supports 10x leverage for 8+ confluences.
analysis.bear_case: VPVR shows price in HVN which can create resistance via profit-taking. Funding at 0.025% per 8h, if it reaches 0.1%+ (extreme+), will attract arb sellers. Any BTC drop through the 4H 21 EMA would invalidate the local momentum case and require immediate position sizing reduction per Part 0B.
analysis.entry_trigger: Retest of $104,800 POC/VWMA zone on 15m with Spot CVD bouncing — confirms institutional demand at structure
analysis.pre_trade_note_why: BOTH_RISING CVD matrix with 11/12 confluences in S1 HEALTHY_UPTREND during NY session — highest probability setup in the playbook
analysis.pre_trade_note_wrong: If Spot CVD flips to falling or price closes below 4H 21 EMA ($102,800), thesis is invalidated — exit immediately
analysis.pre_trade_note_add: Add on confirmed break and retest of $108,500 with Futures CVD still rising and funding still below 0.08%
analysis.failure_mode: Funding reset at 16:00 UTC could temporarily show 0% funding creating false neutrality signal — wait 30 minutes after reset before re-evaluating
